security.sectionDescription: End-to-end encryption keys and activity history.
security.encryptionDescription: Your messages, media, and calls are secured with military-grade hybrid end-to-end encryption. Only you and your recipient can read them.
security.keysBackedUp: Keys are safely synchronized to your secure vault.
security.dashboardDescription: Live monitoring of encryption, multi-path status, and active moderation.

panic.sectionDescription: Extreme emergency protocol for hostile situations.
panic.protocolDescription: Create a secondary fake PIN. If you enter this PIN on the unlock screen under duress, JUST Social will silently destroy your local keys and wipe your cloud backups, making the account appear empty and irretrievable.
panic.contactHelp: We will send them a silent automated message containing your location hash when triggered.

errors.pinMinLength: PIN must be at least 4 digits.
